title: Nipple discharge documentation

referral.text: Supports clinician recognition of an unexplained breast lump and age-qualified nipple or skin changes for referral consideration; it does not assert cancer or generate a referral decision.
referral.rationale: Supports recommendation-qualified documentation of entered nipple and breast symptoms without asserting cancer or referral.
referral.evidence_extract: Supports clinician recognition of an unexplained breast lump and age-qualified nipple or skin changes for referral consideration; it does not assert cancer or generate a referral decision.

source_limitations: Age, pregnancy, lactation, laterality, discharge character, mass, skin and examination findings are absent.
No malignancy risk, investigation, imaging or referral is generated.
Any legacy item not explicitly mapped to an exact section remains unsupported pending qualified clinician review.
No mapping authorises an automatic diagnosis, differential, investigation, management decision, medicine, dose, procedure, referral, urgency conclusion, discharge decision, or patient instruction.
curation_policy: Direct guideline curation: retain only explicitly mapped content; rewrite only with explicit item mapping; remove unmapped legacy content; add only committed exact-section evidence summaries.
